/usr/bin/ar qc libCLIB_OpenEpiCentre.a CMakeFiles/CLIB_OpenEpiCentre.dir/src/CLIB_OpenEpiCentre.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CLIB_OpenEpiCentre.dir/src/engine/Framework_Server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CLIB_OpenEpiCentre.dir/src/engine/Global.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CLIB_OpenEpiCentre.dir/src/structs/Input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CLIB_OpenEpiCentre.dir/src/structs/Output.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CLIB_OpenEpiCentre.dir/src/structs/Concurrent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CLIB_OpenEpiCentre.dir/src/structs/User_Input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CLIB_OpenEpiCentre.dir/src/structs/User_Output.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CLIB_OpenEpiCentre.dir/src/structs/User_Algorithm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CLIB_OpenEpiCentre.dir/src/structs/praise_sets/Algorithm_praise0.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CLIB_OpenEpiCentre.dir/src/structs/praise_sets/Input_praise0.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CLIB_OpenEpiCentre.dir/src/structs/praise_sets/Output_praise0.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CLIB_OpenEpiCentre.dir/src/engine/Server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CLIB_OpenEpiCentre.dir/src/engine/Algorithms.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CLIB_OpenEpiCentre.dir/src/engine/Data.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CLIB_OpenEpiCentre.dir/src/engine/Data_Control.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CLIB_OpenEpiCentre.dir/src/engine/Execute.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CLIB_OpenEpiCentre.dir/src/engine/Execute_Control.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libCLIB_OpenEpiCentre.a
